isolation.storeState: fresh on each navigation (in-memory Zustand), seeded via browser console
isolation.apiKeys: none configured — API calls fail with error toast (expected)

steps.observed: Worldview tab active, page loaded

steps.action: Click New Scene to create scene
steps.observed: Scene 1 chip appeared in scene strip

steps.action: Seed store with world + take via browser console
steps.expected: World and take added to scene
steps.observed: World card and take card rendered in canvas

steps.action: Hover over take card in takes grid
steps.observed: Compose Shot amber button overlay appeared on hover

steps.expected: Switch to shot-composer mode with take reference
steps.observed: Switched to shot-composer mode showing Take 1 as main preview, prompt area, model selector, and all composer controls
Dropdown opened showing 4 models

steps.expected: Nano Banana (🍌), Flux Dev (⚡), Flux Pro Ultra (🔥), OmniGen (🌀)
steps.observed: All 4 models present with correct emojis: 🍌 Nano Banana, ⚡ Flux Dev, 🔥 Flux Pro Ultra, 🌀 OmniGen
Nano Banana has bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-300 (emerald highlight), others have zinc styling
Initial value: 1K
Cycled correctly: 1K → 2K → 4K → 512 → 1K (wraps)
Initial value: 16:9
Initial value: 1x
Cycled correctly: 1x → 2x → 4x → 8x → 1x (wraps)

steps.action: Check send button with empty prompt
steps.observed: Send button disabled (is enabled = false), shown with [disabled] attribute
After filling 'A cinematic wide shot of the world', Send button enabled (is enabled = true), [disabled] attribute removed

assertions.title: Shot generation fires with graceful error

steps.expected: API call fires, graceful error toast on failure
steps.observed: API call to fal-proxy fired, error toast appeared: 'Edge Function returned a non-2xx status code'
No console errors detected

evidence.network: POST to fal-proxy -> non-2xx (expected, no API key)

steps.observed: Returned to canvas mode showing world card with Enter World button, takes grid, and prompt bar. Shot composer no longer visible.
Toggle Hero and Toggle Villain buttons appeared in character roster

steps.expected: Violet chip added to prompt area
steps.observed: Hero violet chip appeared (bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-300) with Remove Hero X button
Villain chip also appeared. Both Remove Hero and Remove Villain visible - multiple selection works
Hero chip removed, only Villain chip remains

steps.action: Enter shot composer from take card
steps.expected: Sky-blue take reference chip in prompt area
steps.observed: Take reference chip present with bg-sky-500/20 text-sky-300 styling, thumbnail image, 'Take' label, and Remove take reference X button
Chip removed from prompt area, Remove take reference button no longer in DOM

frictions.description: The take card for hover interaction was positioned below the viewport after scrolling to the world card. Required scrollIntoView via eval to bring it into the visible area before hovering to reveal the Compose Shot overlay.
frictions.resolution: Used browser eval to scrollIntoView the take image, then used mouse coordinates to hover

frictions.description: The addTake store action requires a WorldviewTake object with sceneId and cameraTransform fields (including fov), not a simplified object. The task prompt's seeding example used an incorrect structure (separate sceneId parameter and missing cameraTransform/fov).
frictions.resolution: Inspected the store types (WorldviewTake, CameraSettings, CameraTransform) and used the correct structure with sceneId inside the take object and proper cameraTransform with fov field

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 10 passed, 0 failed. All shot composer features work correctly: compose shot overlay, model selector with 4 models and emerald highlight, resolution/aspect-ratio/batch-size cycling with proper wrapping, send button disabled/enabled states, graceful error toast on API failure, back-to-canvas navigation, character chip toggling with violet styling, and take reference chip with sky-blue styling and dismiss functionality.
